calendar.matters:
Petition For Claim To Property Calif. Probate Code 17200.0, 850(A)(3)
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Advanced From Dec-04-17 To Nov-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Claim To Property Calif. Probate Code 17200.0, 850(A)(3)
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Antonakos for and with Gary Brickley (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it appears the property was held in the trust and that it was transferred out of the Trust for the purpose of refinancing. Mr. Antonakos stated that this is correct, that there is no documentation, that the loan was done in 1993, and that the deed of trust both were recorded on the same day and notarized by the same Notary and signed by Ms. Brickley on the same day. Mr. Antonakos also stated that they have no evidence that she was told to put the property back in the Trust, that she created the Trust on her own, that the only asset was the home and that withdrawal of the home was clearly for the refinance. The Petition for Claim to Property is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Claim To Property Calif. Probate Code 17200.0, 850(A)(3)
